title: BMS: The Digital Brain for Sustainable Buildings
description: A flowchart illustrating how a Building Management System integrates various subsystems to optimize energy consumption, reduce environmental impact, and enhance occupant comfort.
relationships: Sensors and meters collect real-time data on energy, temperature, and occupancy
BMS Core Controller processes data and automates responses (e.g., adjusting HVAC, dimming lights)
Cloud Analytics provide insights for long-term efficiency improvements
Facility Manager monitors performance and overrides automation via Dashboard
